title: Bellemere Chooses Her Daughters
scene: On pages 4–7, Nojiko’s account of the past reveals how Nami, Bellemere, and Cocoyasi Village were damaged by Arlong’s arrival. Bellemere chooses to acknowledge Nami and Nojiko as her daughters, even when it costs her life.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: No matter what happens,

dialogue.speaker: Bellemere
dialogue.text: Don't ever hate the world you were born under!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's alright if people don't praise or compliment you!

dialogue.speaker: Bellemere
dialogue.text: Don't ever lose the strength to smile no matter when...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Because if you continue to live on,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You'll surely come across fun times as well...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Bellie. mere!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Shah Shaha! Aha!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Under my rule, those without money shall all die! hahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Is that clear, you pathetic humans!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Arlong, look!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I found some sea charts in this house!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Look at all this!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: NYU!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Give'em back! I drew those maps!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm gonna...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Set sail with those maps...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nami, no! Get away from them!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Oh? Colour me imp-ressed...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A little girl was able to draw these excellent maps...!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: She's a valuable talent. Bring her Arlong, HACH!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Sure thing!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Noooo! Let go of me!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Let go of Nami, you...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Stop right there!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Didn't you say you wouldn't harm anyone,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: As long as we made the payment!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ah, don't worry. We won't harm her in any way. We're only borrowing her, that's all.

dialogue.speaker: Genzo
dialogue.text: Gen! Help!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Let go of that girl right now!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: KUROBI.

summary: This part deepens Nami’s backstory, showing how family, money, and survival became tied to Arlong’s control over the village.
